titles.default: Solution Architect | Senior Full Stack Engineer

byRole.golang: Backend Engineer · Open to Go-focused roles

overview.default: Hands-on architect with over 11+ years of experience developing scalable, cloud-native platforms across startups and enterprises. Specializes in JavaScript/TypeScript, .NET, distributed systems, serverless architecture, and real-time data pipelines. Proven leadership in architecting platforms, driving cross-functional teams, and managing the DevOps lifecycle.

byRole.architect: Solution architect with 11+ years building scalable cloud-native platforms. Focus on distributed systems, serverless, CQRS, edge-first design, and real-time data pipelines. Track record of leading migrations, designing event-driven backbones, and aligning engineering execution with product roadmap.
byRole.frontend: Senior frontend engineer with 11+ years across React, Remix, Angular, Astro, Lit and Web Components. Shipped onboarding SDKs, content platforms, and product UIs with strong attention to performance, SEO, and accessibility.
byRole.backend: Backend engineer with 11+ years building APIs, services, and data platforms on Node.js, .NET Core, and serverless runtimes. Deep experience with Postgres, Kafka, Redis, Cosmos DB, ClickHouse, and event-driven architectures.
byRole.dotnet: Senior .NET engineer with extensive experience in ASP.NET Core, Azure Functions, Cosmos DB, SQL Server, and Azure DevOps. Hybrid background also covers Node.js and modern frontend, giving full-stack range on .NET projects.
byRole.js: Senior JavaScript/TypeScript engineer with 11+ years across Node.js, React, Remix, Next.js, Astro, Lit, and the broader npm ecosystem. Experienced in both product engineering and platform/SDK work.
byRole.golang: Backend engineer with 11+ years of distributed-systems and platform experience. Go is part of my working toolbox; actively seeking Go-focused roles where deep service and infra background applies.

items: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront, SNS, SES)

experience.summary: Led architecture and platform engineering for two SaaS products: an onboarding/automation platform and an A/V enhancement workflow service.

bullets.text: Led backend migration of AdoptSequence from AWS Lambda → Trigger.dev to support long-running video processing.
Built a public content-sharing system with Astro + Cloudflare Durable Objects; optimized for SEO and low global latency.
Architected end-to-end audio/video enhancement workflows using FFmpeg, Whisper, and AI voice synthesis.
Integrated Supabase for real-time sync and Postgres storage; replaced Ably, lowering latency and cost.
Operationalized RUM + APM in Datadog with CloudWatch signals; guided devs to review error patterns, improving iteration speed by ~50%.

Implemented PostHog-based interaction analytics with Kafka ingestion, ClickHouse OLAP, and Redis caching; authored the event schema and ETL, reducing time-to-activation and improving onboarding efficiency.
Developed a modular onboarding SDK (Shadow DOM → Lit Web Components) and a lightweight Chrome extension to test/debug onboarding flows.
Owned the full DevOps lifecycle: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, deployment strategy, monitoring, and cloud cost optimization across AWS and Cloudflare.
Managed multi-repo codebases on GitHub with standardized PR reviews and automation.
Mentored junior developers, enforced best practices, and led roadmap execution with founders.
Integrated Clerk authentication across multiple applications.

experience.summary: Modernized internal apps for a global commercial real-estate firm, replacing third-party tools with Azure-native and AWS-native services.

bullets.text: Replaced a 3rd-party valuation tool with an internal AWS solution (EC2, S3, SES, RDS) in 3 weeks; cut vendor cost ~60–80% and absorbed additional developer cost solo.
Architected microservices on Azure Functions backed by Cosmos DB + SQL Server; reduced API p95 latency ~30–50%.
Modernized Angular apps (major version upgrades + module refactors); build time reduced 25–40%, unit test coverage to 90%.
Implemented IaC + CI/CD with Terraform and Azure DevOps.
Migrated Google Maps → Mapbox, added static-map support for exported documents.
Mentored engineers and led POCs with architects/BAs; reduced new-hire ramp ~30–50% and accelerated concept-to-pilot ~2x.
Drove code reviews and onboarding standards; PR cycle time −20–35%, post-release defects −20–40%.
Developed a Clinical Trial Management System for a global pharmaceutical client.
Built an enterprise LMS platform with mobile support for educational clients.
Actively mentored team members on architecture and clean code practices.
Led development for enterprise systems in logistics, education, and fintech.
Mentored junior engineers and participated in system architecture, client demos, and delivery cycles.

projects.name: FinSync — Personal Finance Intelligence
projects.description: Elastic Serverless data streams + Vertex AI. Hybrid search (keyword + vector), monthly transforms, and a RAG chat layer. Pydantic-validated JSON ingestion.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science and Engineering
education.institution: Shahjalal University of Science and Technology
